stubs.name: Retry Simulation - Fail first 2 requests, pass 3rd to upstream

script.code: fn should_inject(request, flow_store) { let flow_id = request.headers["x-flow-id"]; if flow_id == () { flow_id = "default"; }; let attempts = flow_store.get(flow_id, "attempts"); if attempts == () { attempts = 0; }; attempts += 1; flow_store.set(flow_id, "attempts", attempts); if attempts <= 2 { let body = `{"error":"Service temporarily unavailable","attempt":${attempts},"message":"Retry after a moment"}`; let att = `${attempts}`; #{ inject: true, fault: "error", status: 503, body: body, headers: #{"Content-Type": "application/json", "Retry-After": "1", "X-Attempt": att} } } else { #{ inject: false } } }

fn should_inject(request, flow_store) { let flow_id = request.headers["x-flow-id"]; if flow_id == () { flow_id = "default"; }; flow_store.delete(flow_id, "attempts"); let body = `{"message":"Counter reset for flow: ${flow_id}"}`; #{ inject: true, fault: "error", status: 200, body: body, headers: #{"Content-Type": "application/json"} } }

fn should_inject(request, flow_store) { let flow_id = request.headers["x-flow-id"]; if flow_id == () { flow_id = "default"; }; let attempts = flow_store.get(flow_id, "attempts"); if attempts == () { attempts = 0; }; let body = `{"flow_id":"${flow_id}","attempts":${attempts}}`; #{ inject: true, fault: "error", status: 200, body: body, headers: #{"Content-Type": "application/json"} } }
